evaluation_order: deny paths that match neither list

allowed_paths.description: envctl repository root selected by the operator.
nu_plugin repository root selected by the operator.
package-local execution framework state, generated artifacts, logs, and proofs.

blocked_paths.description: environment files are never read into logs, prompts, proofs, or generated artifacts.
secret directories are outside helper read and write scope.
private key directories are outside helper read and write scope.
PEM material is excluded even inside otherwise allowed roots.
key material is excluded even inside otherwise allowed roots.

safe_workspaces.purpose: helper-local scratch state and resumable progress markers
safe_workspaces.write_policy: append-or-replace files owned by the active helper_id only
safe_workspaces.retention: task lifetime unless retained as evidence

safe_workspaces.purpose: machine-readable task artifacts and validation reports
safe_workspaces.write_policy: additive task-specific files; do not overwrite unrelated task output
task-specific log files named by task_id

safe_workspaces.purpose: task proof JSON and proof ledger entries
safe_workspaces.write_policy: task-specific proof file plus proof_ledger.jsonl append/update

rules: Blocked patterns take precedence over allowed paths.
Background helpers must not read or write paths that match blocked_paths.
Background helpers may read and write only paths that match allowed_paths and do not match blocked_paths.
ENVCTL_REPO and NU_PLUGIN_REPO are operator-provided roots; if unset, helpers must treat those lanes as unavailable.
Helper scratch writes must use execution-framework/state/helpers/${HELPER_ID}/ unless the task packet names a narrower output path.
Logs and proof evidence must be redacted using helpers/redaction_patterns.txt before capture.
Symlink traversal must be evaluated against the final resolved path and denied when it escapes the matched allowed root.

redaction.capture_policy: logs, proof evidence, and generated reports must not contain matched secret values
